title: IoT Enabled Device-to-Device Communication for Smart City Application
desc: IoT system that enables direct communication between devices for smart home control, improving energy efficiency.

title: Design of Intelligent Wardrobe System Based on IoT Technology
desc: IoT-based smart wardrobe with dehumidification, temperature/humidity monitoring, and smart lighting.

title: Design and Implementation of an IoT-Enabled Rover with ESP32 CAM for Object Detection
desc: IoT-enabled rover using ESP32-CAM for object detection, remote control, and environmental monitoring.

title: IVEMPS: IoT-Based Vehicle Emission Monitoring and Prediction System
desc: Monitors and predicts vehicle emissions in real time using gas sensors and deep learning.

title: RF and IoT-Driven Automated Lane Clearance System for Enhanced Emergency Response
desc: Automated lane clearance system enabling real-time communication between ambulances, vehicles, and traffic signals.

title: Utilization of Li-Fi Technology for Black Box in Ground Vehicles
desc: Low cost, universal Black Box for vehicles using Li-Fi technology for fast data communication and accident analysis.

title: Plant Disease Classification Using an Ensemble Learning Model of CNN and Vision Transformers
desc: Combine CNN and ViT for robust plant disease detection to boost accuracy and adaptability in agriculture.

title: Intelligent Energy-Efficient GNSS-Assisted and LoRa-Based Positioning for Wildlife Tracking
desc: Energy-efficient wildlife tracking system using LoRaWAN modules and GNSS for accurate location estimation.

title: Enhancing Care and Communication for Paralyzed Patients: Gesture Sensor Approach with GSM
desc: Microcontroller with gesture sensors to detect hand movements and send alerts via GSM module for paralyzed patients.

title: Web-Server Controlled Rover with Robotic Arm and Object Detection
desc: Web-server controlled rover with a robotic arm allowing remote movement and object detection using camera modules.

title: A Real-Time Intelligent System Based on Machine-Learning Methods for Improving Sign Language
desc: Intelligent system using camera and ML to recognize and translate sign language gestures into text or speech.

title: A Portable Real-Time Electronic Nose for Evaluating Seafood Freshness Using Machine Learning
desc: Detect seafood freshness using gas sensors and ML for portable, real-time spoilage prediction.

title: Fast and High-Precision Human Fall Detection Using Improved YOLOv8 Model
desc: Detect human falls quickly using optimized YOLOv8 to provide real-time alerts in care or surveillance systems.

title: YOLO-Based Abnormal Behavior Detection System for Elderly Healthcare Monitoring
desc: Use YOLO-based computer vision to accurately detect abnormal behaviors in elderly individuals for timely alerts.

title: Smart Greenhouse Monitoring with Predictive Crop Health using ML
desc: Intelligent system that monitors environmental conditions and predicts crop health to optimize agricultural productivity.

title: AI Powered Automatic Pothole Detection and Filling System for Smart Road Maintenance
desc: AI-Powered system that detects potholes in real-time using AI and automates the filling process for smart roads.

title: Intelligent Chemical Monitoring System Using Raspberry Pi, LoRa, and Machine Learning
desc: Low-cost Raspberry Pi system monitoring chemical parameters in real time using LoRa and ML.

title: Raspberry Pi-Based Eye Movement Controlled Cursor System Using OpenCV
desc: Raspberry Pi system using OpenCV to track eye movements for hands-free cursor control.

title: AI-Powered Crop Monitoring System with Android App Integration
desc: AI powered crop monitoring system providing real-time health analysis and alerts via an Android app.

title: Automated Weed Identification and Plucking Using Deep Learning Techniques
desc: Deep learning system that automatically identifies and removes weeds, reducing crop damage and manual effort.

title: Multi-Level Bank Locker Security System Using Raspberry Pi with Face, Fingerprint, and OTP
desc: Multi-level bank locker system using face recognition, fingerprint scanning, and OTP verification to enhance security.

title: AI-Powered Receptionist Robot with Facial Recognition and Voice Interaction
desc: Design a Raspberry Pi receptionist robot with multi-level security and human interaction features.

title: IoT-Based Real-Time Crop Irrigation, Disease Identification, and Animal Intrusion Alert System
desc: IoT based smart farming system automating irrigation, identifying crop diseases, and detecting animal intrusions.

title: Al-Powered Yield Estimation System using On-Field Image Data and Soil Parameters
desc: AI-based system that analyzes crop images and soil parameters to accurately estimate yield for farmers.

title: Edge AI-Enabled Smart Vision Assistant for Visually Challenged Individuals
desc: Portable edge-AI system recognizing objects, text, and surroundings in real time for visually impaired assistance.
